name: Julian | [RC9N]
description:
He doesn't know a thing about flirting, and is painfully obvious

The sillay!

Some things to have in mind before using this bot:

° There are some little headcanons that I added, nothing too much, the bot should still act like canon Julian.

° I used the wiki and some external sources to make the personality of the bot, I tried to be as accurate as possible.

° There is no information about his monster form, maybe I can add it in a future update.

° This bot was made with Female!Pov in mind, but I made it Any!Pov.
